title: Proactive Threat Hunting - Block Account
content:
This playbook will be executed from the "Proactive Threat Hunting" layout button with the objective of blocking a user specified by the analyst.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (ProactiveThreatHunting, xsoar-supported).

Use cases: Hunting.

Integrations/scripts used: Print.
